text: 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 🇷🇺 Unblocking €90 billion is pushing Russia to think more about negotiations — Zelensky 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 🇷🇺 泽连斯基：解冻900亿欧元正促使俄罗斯更多地考虑谈判 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇦🇷🇺EU Foreign Minister Kallas announced that the EU has come to an agreement on the €90 billion loan for Ukraine and the 20th sanctions package for Russia. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Former Russian President Medvedev commented on the EU agreeing on its €90 billion loan to Ukraine, saying that in their flawed logic the EU expects Russia to pay for the loan. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇦🇷🇺欧盟外交与安全政策高级代表卡拉斯宣布，欧盟已就向乌克兰提供900亿欧元贷款及对俄第20轮制裁方案达成一致。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 俄罗斯前总统梅德韦杰夫评论欧盟就向乌克兰提供900亿欧元贷款达成一致一事，称欧盟在他们那套荒谬的逻辑中，竟指望由俄罗斯来偿还这笔贷款。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf also reacts on Trump statement: We are all “Iranian” and “revolutionary.” One God, one Leader, one nation, and one path — the path of victory for Iran, dearer than our lives. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫也对特朗普的声明作出回应：我们都是“伊朗人”和“革命者”。同一个上帝，同一个领袖，同一个国家，同一条道路——这是伊朗胜利的道路，它比我们的生命更宝贵。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said there are no hardliners or moderates in Iran; everyone is Iranian and revolutionary. “With the iron unity of the nation and the government, in full obedience to the Supreme Leader, we will make…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian restated the same statement as Iranian parliamentary speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，伊朗没有强硬派或温和派之分；每个人都是伊朗人和革命者。‘在国家和政府的铁血团结下，在完全服从最高领袖的情况下，我们将……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽希齐扬重申了与伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫相同的声明。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said there are no hardliners or moderates in Iran; everyone is Iranian and revolutionary. “With the iron unity of the nation and the government, in full obedience to the Supreme Leader, we will make the criminal aggressor regret it. One God, one leader, one nation, and one path – the path of victory for Iran, dearer than life.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，伊朗没有强硬派或温和派之分；每个人都是伊朗人和革命者。“在国家和政府的铁血团结下，在完全服从最高领袖的情况下，我们将让犯罪侵略者感到后悔。同一个上帝，同一个领袖，同一个国家，同一条道路——这是伊朗胜利的道路，它比生命更宝贵。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 Donny is talking tough while low-key sending ‘please negotiate’ energy to Iran 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Gholam-Hossein Mohseni-Eje'i, Head of Iran’s Judiciary on Trump : "The despicable President of the United States must know that 'hardliner' and 'moderate' are fabricated and meaningless terms that are common in Western political discourse." "In the Islamic Republic of Iran, all segments and factions ultimately stand in full strength and unity under the leadership of the Supreme Leader." 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷唐纳德说话强硬，却在私下里传递着‘请谈判’的信号 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗司法总监吴拉姆-侯赛因·穆赫辛尼-埃杰伊就特朗普发表评论：“这位卑鄙的美国总统必须知道，‘强硬派’和‘温和派’是西方政治话语中常见的捏造且毫无意义的术语。”“在伊朗伊斯兰共和国，所有阶层和派系最终都在最高领袖的领导下，以全部力量和团结站在一起。” 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: 🇺🇦 Zelensky says Ukraine must build its own anti-ballistic missile capabilities as it cannot rely on the U.S. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 泽连斯基表示，乌克兰必须建立自己的反弹道导弹能力，因为它不能依赖美国 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 12: Iran is unwilling to move without the lifting of the US naval blockade, a senior source familiar with the negotiations said, adding that Tehran is “going crazy” from the blockade. U.S. intelligence assesses that Iran is adding…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Israeli Channel 12: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu will convene a narrow cabinet tonight to discuss Iran and Lebanon. Israeli officials estimate that by early next week U.S. President Trump’s final direction will become clear, but “we are approaching renewed fighting”. “The situation is clear: Trump extends a hand, the Americans want a deal – but there is no one to make it with,” a source said. Iran is not compromising on the removal of enriched nuclear uranium from its soil or the cessation of enrichment on its territory. Two options remain: Trump continues or intensifies the economic blockade, or moves to military action – limited or wide. Israel understands the U.S. would like to avoid this, but Iranian refusal and mockery of the president may make it unavoidable soon. Trump may also join the Israel‑Lebanon talks at the White House. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱以色列第12频道：一位熟悉谈判的高级消息人士称，除非美国解除海上封锁，否则伊朗不愿采取行动，并补充说德黑兰因封锁而‘快要疯了’。美国情报部门评估称，伊朗正在增加……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 以色列第12频道：以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡将于今晚召集一个小型内阁会议，讨论伊朗和黎巴嫩问题。以色列官员估计，到下周初，美国总统特朗普的最终方针将变得明朗，但“我们正接近重新开战”。一位消息人士称：“情况很明确：特朗普伸出了手，美国人想要达成协议——但没有人可以与之达成协议。”伊朗在从其领土上移除浓缩核铀或停止其领土上的浓缩活动方面不予妥协。剩下的两个选择是：特朗普继续或加强经济封锁，或者采取军事行动——有限度或全面行动。以色列明白美国希望避免这种情况，但伊朗的拒绝和对总统的嘲弄可能很快使其变得不可避免。特朗普也可能加入在白宫举行的以黎谈判。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱 Channel 12: The Israeli mini-security cabinet will convene at 20:00 local time. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 Kan: Israel is weighing the possibility of renewed fighting on both the Iranian and Lebanese fronts as ceasefires near their expiry with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu holding a special security consultation amid escalating tensions in the north, even as direct Israel–Lebanon negotiations continue in parallel. On Iran, the report claims Israeli officials are warning of potential escalation and have referenced senior Iranian figures, including Mojtaba Khamenei, as part of a possible “target package,” pending political approval from the United States. It also notes that President Donald Trump’s recent statements have added uncertainty about the coming days. On Lebanon, the U.S. is reportedly pushing to extend the ceasefire, which is expected to be raised in tonight’s discussions. Lebanon is expected to seek adjustments to Israeli positions near the current force line, while Israel is resisting any withdrawal from the newly established security zone in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱第12频道：以色列小型安全内阁将于当地时间20:00召开会议。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 Kan：随着停火协议即将到期，以色列正在权衡在伊朗和黎巴嫩两条战线重新开战的可能性。以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡在北部紧张局势升级的情况下举行了特别安全磋商，尽管以黎直接谈判仍在同步进行。关于伊朗，报道称以色列官员警告可能出现升级，并提到包括穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊在内的伊朗高级人物作为可能的“目标清单”的一部分，正等待美国的政治批准。报道还指出，唐纳德·特朗普总统最近的声明增加了未来几天的不确定性。关于黎巴嫩，据报道美国正在推动延长停火协议，预计今晚的讨论将提出这一议题。预计黎巴嫩将寻求调整以色列在当前部队线附近的立场，而以色列则抵制从黎巴嫩南部新建立的安全区撤军。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 12: At the request of the United States, Israel is maintaining a restrained posture in Lebanon, with the conflict kept at low intensity. The political initiative with the Lebanese government is designed to undermine Hezbollah, with…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 12: Iran is unwilling to move without the lifting of the US naval blockade, a senior source familiar with the negotiations said, adding that Tehran is “going crazy” from the blockade. U.S. intelligence assesses that Iran is adding more sea mines in the Strait of Hormuz. U.S. officials say Israel does not currently have a green light for action, but that could change. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧以色列第12频道：应美国要求，以色列在黎巴嫩保持克制姿态，冲突保持在低强度。针对黎巴嫩政府的政治倡议旨在削弱真主党，并……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 以色列第12频道：一位熟悉谈判的高级消息人士称，除非美国解除海上封锁，否则伊朗不愿采取行动，并补充说德黑兰因封锁而‘快要疯了’。美国情报部门评估称，伊朗正在霍尔木兹海峡增加水雷。美国官员表示，以色列目前没有获得行动的绿灯，但这可能会改变。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇱🇺🇸 Israeli Channel 12: A severe crisis has hit Iran’s leadership with Iranian Parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher-Ghalibaf resigning from the Iranian negotiating team. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 12: At the request of the United States, Israel is maintaining a restrained posture in Lebanon, with the conflict kept at low intensity. The political initiative with the Lebanese government is designed to undermine Hezbollah, with American backing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇱🇺🇸以色列第12频道：伊朗领导层遭遇严重危机，伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫已辞去伊朗谈判小组成员职务。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列第12频道：应美国要求，以色列在黎巴嫩保持克制姿态，冲突保持在低强度。针对黎巴嫩政府的政治倡议旨在削弱真主党，并得到美国的支持。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN: 19 ships U.S. Navy ships are currently operating in the Middle East, including two aircraft carriers, and an additional seven ships in the Indian Ocean. A U.S. official reports that at least 33 ships have reportedly been redirected to the area since the start of the naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz on April 13th. The vessels deployed in the Middle East include: Aircraft carriers: USS Abraham Lincoln USS Gerald R. Ford Destroyers: USS Bainbridge USS Thomas Hudner USS Frank E. Petersen Jr. USS Delbert D Black USS Michael Murphy USS Mitscher USS Rafael Peralta USS Spruance USS Milius USS Churchilll USS Truxton USS Mahan Littoral combat ships: USS Canberra USS Tulsa Amphibious ready group: USS Tripoli (Amphibious assault ship) USS New Orleans (Amphibious transport dock) USS Rushmore (Dock-landing ship) The following ships are deployed in the Indian Ocean: USS John Finn USS Pinckney USS Higgins USS Mustin USS McFaul USS John L. Canley USS Santa Barbara @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN：目前有19艘美国海军舰艇在中东地区执行任务，其中包括两艘航空母舰，另有7艘舰艇在印度洋。据一位美国官员报告，自4月13日霍尔木兹海峡海军封锁开始以来，据报道至少有33艘舰艇已被调往该地区。部署在中东的舰艇包括：航空母舰：亚伯拉罕·林肯号（USS Abraham Lincoln）、杰拉尔德·R·福特号（USS Gerald R. Ford）；驱逐舰：班布里奇号（USS Bainbridge）、托马斯·哈德纳号（USS Thomas Hudner）、弗兰克·E·彼得森号（USS Frank E. Petersen Jr.）、德尔伯特·D·布莱克号（USS Delbert D Black）、迈克尔·墨菲号（USS Michael Murphy）、米彻尔号（USS Mitscher）、拉斐尔·佩拉尔塔号（USS Rafael Peralta）、斯普鲁恩斯号（USS Spruance）、米利厄斯号（USS Milius）、丘吉尔号（USS Churchill）、特鲁克斯顿号（USS Truxton）、马汉号（USS Mahan）；濒海战斗舰：堪培拉号（USS Canberra）、塔尔萨号（USS Tulsa）；两栖戒备群：的黎波里号（USS Tripoli，两栖攻击舰）、新奥尔良号（USS New Orleans，两栖船坞运输舰）、拉什莫尔号（USS Rushmore，船坞登陆舰）。以下舰艇部署在印度洋：约翰·芬恩号（USS John Finn）、平克尼号（USS Pinckney）、希金斯号（USS Higgins）、马斯廷号（USS Mustin）、麦克福尔号（USS McFaul）、约翰·L·坎利号（USS John L. Canley）、圣巴巴拉号（USS Santa Barbara）。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: Israel estimates that a renewal of the war with Iran is approaching. Tehran is not compromising on the removal of its enriched uranium stockpile or the cessation of uranium enrichment. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Israeli Channel 12: A severe crisis has hit Iran’s leadership with Iranian Parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher-Ghalibaf resigning from the Iranian negotiating team. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：以色列估计与伊朗的战争重启在即。德黑兰在移除浓缩铀库存或停止铀浓缩方面没有妥协。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 以色列第12频道：伊朗领导层遭遇严重危机，伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher-Ghalibaf）已辞去伊朗谈判小组成员职务。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: Israel estimates that a renewal of the war with Iran is approaching. Tehran is not compromising on the removal of its enriched uranium stockpile or the cessation of uranium enrichment. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：以色列估计与战争重启在即。德黑兰在移除浓缩铀库存或停止铀浓缩方面没有妥协。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷Kan: Two Israeli F-15 technicians have been arrested and charged with attempting to pass along sensitive information about Israeli F-15s to Iran. “The Iranian regime has been exposed in the air, we are with you on this, tomorrow there will be interrogations…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Army Radio: New details have emerged in the espionage case involving two Israeli Air Force soldiers. Iranian agents requested that one of the soldiers assassinate the commander of the air force, Maj. Gen. Tomer Bar. The soldier replied that he would “check and try”. The Iranians also requested photographs of the streets where Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu, former premier Naftali Bennett, Minister Ben Gvir and former chief of staff Herzli Halevi live, as well as images of Iron Dome batteries and air defence systems. The contact lasted a full year. When asked what monthly salary would satisfy him, the soldier asked for $1,300. The soldier passed information on fighter jet systems taken from a training binder. He photographed a control tower and a fighter jet but received no payment. The Iranians told him it was not enough and demanded a photo of a jet taking off. Before Operation Am Kalavi in mid‑2025, the Iranians asked him to deliberately delay operational flights for a few hundred dollars; he refused. When an Iranian handler asked him to carry out a weapons attack, the soldier refused, and the handler cut contact. The soldier then tried to renew contact and searched for other Iranian agents, but Iran suspected he was a double agent and did not respond. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Kan：两名以色列F-15技术人员被捕并被指控试图向伊朗传递有关以色列F-15战机的敏感信息。“伊朗政权在空中已被曝光，我们与你们同在，明天将进行审讯……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列陆军电台：涉及两名以色列空军士兵的间谍案出现了新细节。伊朗特工要求其中一名士兵暗杀空军司令托梅尔·巴尔（Tomer Bar）少将。该士兵回答说他会“检查并尝试”。伊朗人还要求提供以色列总理内塔尼亚胡、前总理纳夫塔利·贝内特、部长本·格维尔和前参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维居住的街道照片，以及“铁穹”电池和防空系统的图像。接触持续了整整一年。当被问及多少月薪能让他满意时，该士兵要求1300美元。该士兵从训练手册中传递了有关战斗机系统的信息。他拍摄了一座控制塔和一架战斗机，但没有收到报酬。伊朗人告诉他这还不够，并要求提供一架飞机起飞的照片。在2025年中期的“阿姆卡拉维行动”（Operation Am Kalavi）之前，伊朗人要求他以几百美元的报酬故意延误作战飞行；他拒绝了。当一名伊朗联络人要求他发动武器袭击时，该士兵拒绝了，联络人切断了联系。随后该士兵试图重新建立联系并寻找其他伊朗特工，但伊朗怀疑他是双重间谍，没有回应。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Senior Israeli official: "We are preparing for approval from the Trump administration to resume the fighting." Netanyahu is convening a limited security cabinet call within the hour. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）高级以色列官员：“我们正在等待特朗普政府批准恢复战斗。”内塔尼亚胡将于一小时内召开有限安全内阁会议。推文

text: Open Source Intel An AI startup built a tool that deliberately adds typos and grammatical errors to emails so they don't look AI-written. The anti-Grammarly. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）一家人工智能初创公司开发了一种工具，可以故意在电子邮件中添加拼写错误和语法错误，使其看起来不像是由人工智能编写的。这是反Grammarly工具。推文

text: Open Source Intel UK PM Starmer: "Very concerned that a number of countries are using proxies to commit attacks in Britain." What's he talking about? https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047352489100312851/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）英国首相斯塔默：“非常担心一些国家正在利用代理人在英国发动袭击。”他在说什么？https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047352489100312851/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender In addition to the reports on his health, the New York Times has reported that Iran’s principal decision-maker, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, communicates with subordinates through sealed handwritten messages that are relayed to him by a system of couriers and he has delegated some decision-making powers to his generals. This has in turn allowed for them to gain a disproportionate amount of influence in the wider Iranian decision-making process. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 除了关于他健康的报道外，《纽约时报》报道称，伊朗的主要决策者阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）通过密封的手写信息与下属沟通，这些信息由快递系统转达给他，并且他已将部分决策权下放给将军们。这反过来使他们在更广泛的伊朗决策过程中获得了不成比例的影响力。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Full statement from Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz: Israel is prepared to resume the war against Iran. The IDF is ready both defensively and offensively, and the targets are marked. We are waiting for a green light from the United States, first and foremost to complete the elimination of the Khamenei dynasty, the initiator of the annihilation plan against Israel, and the successors of the leadership of the Iranian terror regime, and in addition to return Iran to the stone age by destroying its central energy and electricity facilities and crushing its national economic infrastructure. The terror regime in Iran specializes mainly in internal repression of the population through the Revolutionary Guards and the Basij, and in energy blackmail, threatening to raise global oil prices. It is on its knees; its leaders are hiding in tunnels and struggling to communicate and make decisions. Its skies are wide open, and all of its national infrastructure and strategic facilities are exposed to attacks, yet it declares that it is winning. Just like Hezbollah in Lebanon and Hamas in Gaza Strip, it does not care about the heavy price paid by the population, only about its own survival, which is not guaranteed either. This time, the attack will be different and more lethal, delivering devastating blows at the most painful points - building on the massive blows the Iranian terror regime has already suffered, shaking and collapsing its foundations. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列国防部长以色列·卡茨（Israel Katz）的完整声明：以色列准备恢复对伊朗的战争。以色列国防军在防御和进攻方面都已做好准备，目标已经标记。我们正在等待美国的绿灯，首先是为了彻底消灭哈梅内伊王朝——这一针对以色列的灭绝计划的发起者，以及伊朗恐怖政权领导层的继任者；此外，通过摧毁其核心能源和电力设施并粉碎其国家经济基础设施，使伊朗回到石器时代。伊朗的恐怖政权主要擅长通过革命卫队和巴斯基民兵对民众进行内部镇压，以及进行能源勒索，威胁提高全球油价。它已经跪倒在地；其领导人躲在隧道里，难以沟通和做出决定。它的天空完全敞开，其所有国家基础设施和战略设施都暴露在攻击之下，但它却宣称自己正在获胜。就像黎巴嫩的真主党和加沙地带的哈马斯一样，它不在乎民众付出的沉重代价，只在乎自己的生存，而这种生存也无法得到保证。这一次，攻击将有所不同且更加致命，在最痛苦的地方进行毁灭性打击——建立在伊朗恐怖政权已经遭受的沉重打击之上，动摇并瓦解其根基。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to the New York Times, citing Iranian officials familiar with the matter, Iran’s supreme leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, remains gravely wounded from a strike earlier in the war but is still mentally sharp. Per the report, Iran’s principal decision-maker has had surgery on one leg three times, is currently awaiting a prosthetic, suffered burns to his face and lips, and is slowly regaining function of his injured areas. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据《纽约时报》援引熟悉此事的伊朗官员的话称，伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊在战争初期的一次袭击中受重伤，但头脑依然敏锐。据报道，这位伊朗的主要决策者的一条腿已经接受了三次手术，目前正在等待假肢，他的脸部和嘴唇被烧伤，受伤部位的功能正在缓慢恢复。推文

text: Spanish Army VAMTAC vehicle fell from a parachute drop during training after a rigging failure, crashing from ~300m and being completely destroyed.
text_zh: 西班牙陆军一辆VAMTAC车辆在训练期间因索具故障从降落伞上坠落，从约300米高处坠毁并完全损毁。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF said that earlier this Thursday in the Aainata area of southern Lebanon, its soldiers identified two armed individuals who approached their position and posed an immediate threat. The soldiers engaged and eliminated the individuals to remove the threat. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军表示，本周四早些时候在黎巴嫩南部Aainata地区，其士兵发现两名武装人员靠近其阵地并构成直接威胁。士兵们进行了交战并消灭了这些人员以消除威胁。 @wfwitness

text: Israeli troops, both active-duty and reservists, have been looting homes and businesses in southern Lebanon, taking items like motorcycles, TVs, and furniture. The practice is described as widespread and routine, with both junior and senior commanders reportedly aware but not taking disciplinary action to stop it. Source: Haaretz
text_zh: 以色列军队，包括现役军人和预备役人员，一直在黎巴嫩南部抢劫民宅和企业，拿走摩托车、电视机和家具等物品。这种行为被描述为普遍且常规的，据报道，初级和高级指挥官都知道此事，但并未采取纪律处分来制止。来源：国土报

text: Germany’s Bundeswehr is struggling to recruit enough troops, so it’s targeting young people—especially gamers—through events like Gamescom.
text_zh: 德国联邦国防军正努力招募足够的士兵，因此通过Gamescom等活动瞄准年轻人，尤其是游戏玩家。

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "🇱🇧l🇮🇱 Israeli soldiers inside a house in south Lebanon on 6-OctThere they are wrecking the house, checking it, and in a very envious tone full of lack of self-esteem they compare the house's quality and design to Gaza's." Reminds me of this. There are at least 4 documented Israeli burning of large expensive villas in this channel.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Lebanese News and Updates: "🇱🇧l🇮🇱 10月6日黎巴嫩南部一所房子里的以色列士兵。他们在那里破坏房子，检查它，并以一种充满缺乏自尊的嫉妒语气将房子的质量和设计与加沙进行了比较。" 让我想起了这个。在这个频道里至少有4起有记录的以色列焚烧大型昂贵别墅的事件。

text: OSINTdefender RT @TheIntelFrog : UPDATE: There are 4 minesweeping ships in the US Navy, 2 in Japan and 2 are en route to the CENTCOM/5th Fleet (may already be in the AOR). There are 3 Littoral Combat Ships (LCS) with mine countermeasures modules (MCM) assigned to CENTCOM/5th Fleet with only 1, the USS Canberra (LCS 30), likely in the region. The other 2, USS Tulsa (LCS 16) and USS Santa Barbara (LCS 32), were last spotted in the Malacca Strait heading back towards CENTCOM. h/t: @ianellisjones President Donald J. Trump has posted to his Truth Social account stating that he has ordered the U.S. Navy to "shoot and kill any boat" laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz without hesitation. He goes on to say that minesweepers are actively clearing the Strait right now and that he's ordered that activity to triple. - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @TheIntelFrog : 更新：美国海军有4艘扫雷舰，2艘在日本，2艘正在前往中央司令部/第五舰队的途中（可能已经在责任区内）。有3艘濒海战斗舰（LCS）配备了反水雷模块（MCM）分配给中央司令部/第五舰队，其中只有1艘，即堪培拉号（LCS 30），可能在该地区。另外2艘，塔尔萨号（LCS 16）和圣巴巴拉号（LCS 32），最后一次被发现是在马六甲海峡，正返回中央司令部。致谢：@ianellisjones 唐纳德·J·特朗普总统在他的“真实社交”账户上发帖称，他已命令美国海军“射杀任何”在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的船只，毫不犹豫。他接着说，扫雷舰目前正在积极清理海峡，他已下令将该活动增加两倍。 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: ✡ Talking about Jewish morales: Regular and reserve soldiers are looting civilian property from homes and businesses in southern Lebanon, according to fighters and field commanders stationed in the area who spoke to Haaretz. According to the testimonies, the theft of motorcycles, televisions, paintings, sofas, and carpets has become widespread and commonplace, with no disciplinary action taken. The soldiers also load stolen equipment onto their vehicles upon leaving Lebanon, without any attempt to conceal it. One fighter said, "It's happening on a crazy scale. Everyone who takes something—televisions, cigarettes, tools, or anything else —immediately puts it in their vehicle or leaves it aside. It's not inside the military compound, but it's not done in secret. Everyone sees it." Full article: https://x.com/i/status/2047263903592145331
text_zh: ✡ 谈谈犹太人的道德：据驻扎在该地区并接受《国土报》采访的战斗人员和现场指挥官称，正规军和预备役士兵正在黎巴嫩南部抢劫民宅和企业的平民财产。据证词，偷窃摩托车、电视机、画作、沙发和地毯已变得普遍且司空见惯，且没有任何纪律处分。士兵们在离开黎巴嫩时还将偷来的设备装上他们的车辆，没有任何掩饰的企图。一名战斗人员说：“这正在以疯狂的规模发生。每个拿东西的人——电视机、香烟、工具或其他任何东西——都会立即把它放进他们的车里或放在一边。它不在军事大院内，但也不是秘密进行的。每个人都看到了。” 完整文章：https://x.com/i/status/2047263903592145331
